# Remote Factory Acceptance Testing: Enabling Global Procurement with Virtual Inspection Protocols

## 适用受众
Project_Manager

## 写作角度说明
跨境采购中，远程工厂验收测试（Remote FAT）正在成为项目经理的标准工具，尤其在旅行受限或紧急项目中至关重要。本角度帮助项目经理解析如何组织有效的远程FAT，确保采购质量不因无法实地验收而打折扣。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Remote Factory Acceptance Testing—properly structured with witnessed live tests, real-time video inspection, and digitized documentation—delivers comparable confidence to physical attendance at a fraction of the cost and logistics complexity.

## 参考素材
- Remote FAT scope definition: mechanical inspection, electrical verification, functional testing checklist
- Live video inspection protocol: camera positioning for seal compression measurement, HEPA filter scan observation
- Witnessed testing requirements: pressure decay test witnessed via video call, interlock sequence recording
- Third-party inspection agencies: hiring local inspectors (SGS, Bureau Veritas) for on-site witness
- Documentation digitization: cloud-based document sharing, digital sign-off for approval records
- Time zone coordination: scheduled testing windows, multiple shift coverage, recording for later review
- Internet bandwidth requirements: HD video streaming, real-time data display sharing, screen capture
- Acceptance criteria communication: pre-agreeing on pass/fail standards before remote testing
- Legal validity: remote witnessed tests documented per ISO 2859-1 sampling standards

## 关键词
Remote FAT, Factory Acceptance Test, Virtual Inspection, Witnessed Testing, Remote Witness, Digital Documentation, Third-Party Inspection, Cloud Collaboration, Project Management
